text: This Biennial Review summarizes recent developments in atomic weight determinations and in associated aspects of isotopic data. Revised standard atomic weights are recommended for five elements, bromine on account of the adoption of a new definition and representation of its atomic weight, including margins of variation of the naturally occurring mixtures of its bromine isotopes found in present samples in common terrestrial materials; and magnesium, germanium, indium, and mercury based on improvements in determinations of their mean atomic weights.
